page_metadata.biocontainers__summary: Bfc is a standalone high-performance tool for correcting sequencing errors from illumina sequencing data.
page_metadata.biotools__summary: Standalone high-performance tool for correcting sequencing errors from Illumina sequencing data. It is specifically designed for high-coverage whole-genome human data, though also performs well for small genomes.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Standalone high-performance tool for correcting sequencing errors from Illumina sequencing data. It is specifically designed for high-coverage whole-genome human data, though also performs well for small genomes.
